programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 123
programme.desc: A subway dispatcher's day is thrown into chaos when four armed men hijack the subway train and take the commuters as hostages. They demand USD 10 million from the mayor as ransom.

programme.title: A-X-L
programme.desc: Miles befriends A-X-L, a robotic dog, when he manages to activate its owner-pairing technology. However, Miles's life takes an unusual turn when A-X-L's creators come searching for it.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: The fallout of a military nuclear test causes an iguana to mutate into a giant monster. Now this monster lays waste to cannery ships and New York City in order to feed and protect its brood.

programme.title: Brightburn
programme.desc: Tori and Kyle find a baby boy in a spaceship and adopt him as their own child, Brandon. However, after turning 12, Brandon learns that he has superpowers and begins to use them for sinister purposes.

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
programme.desc: Spider-Man seeks the help of Doctor Strange to forget his exposed secret identity as Peter Parker. However, Strange's spell goes horribly wrong, leading to unwanted guests entering their universe.

programme.title: Sisu
programme.desc: As WWII comes to an end, Aatami Korpi trudges towards retirement with a bag full of gold. However, when a Nazi soldier learns about the treasure, he chases after the warrior, unaware of his prowess.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A dying curator of the Louvre hides cryptic clues on Da Vinci paintings. Now it is up to Robert Langdon and Sophie Neveu to follow the clues and unearth a secret kept hidden for centuries.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, a professional assassin, is assigned to retrieve a briefcase from a bullet train. Soon, he finds himself battling many other killers who board the same train but with a different objective.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Determined to cure the disease that has plagued him his entire life, Morbius conducts a drastic experiment, which bears unforeseen consequences.

programme.title: Mahadev & Sons Ep46
programme.desc: Mahadev, a man of principle, runs a strict household as the head of his family. However, his children rebel, and a generational clash ensues.

programme.title: Tuu Juliet Jatt Di Ep89
programme.desc: Tu Juliet Jatt Di is a Punjabi romance-drama about Heer, a focused student, and Nawab, a carefree Jatt, whose arranged marriage before college leads to a journey of love, clashes, and self-discovery.

programme.title: Mannat Harr Khushi Paane Ki Ep359
programme.desc: Abandoned and gifted, Mannat becomes a chef, unaware her boss is her mother. Secrets and betrayal test her strength. Will she find her destiny?

programme.title: Dr. Aarambhi Ep12
programme.desc: Dr. Aarambhi follows a former medical topper who returns to her profession after years devoted to family, rediscovering her purpose, strength, and passion for healing.

programme.title: (DL) World News
programme.desc: Delivers timely and in-depth coverage of key global events, focusing on international politics, economics, and societal changes, with a spotlight on the latest developments impacting the world today.

programme.title: TVS Music
programme.desc: TVS Music is a compilation of songs that celebrates the rich and diverse musical talents of the region, featuring a mix of contemporary hits and culturally inspired tracks from local artists.

programme.title: Homecoming Gawai
programme.desc: A Dayak boxer tries to redeem himself to his family during Gawai after leaving them on bad terms.

programme.title: Seput Nyawaku
programme.desc: Three rival sisters reunite to recreate their late mother's special Gawai dish, navigating old traditions and cooking challenges. Their journey mends their bond and fulfills their father's final wish.

programme.title: Gawai Enggau Aki
programme.desc: When a young girl's quest to revive forgotten Gawai traditions in her Iban longhouse meets resistance from her father and​ community, she takes matters into her own hands to rekindle a cultural legacy.

programme.title: (L) TVS Sana Sini
programme.desc: A local perspective on international and domestic affairs, TVS Sana Sini offers concise news stories the Weather Report, providing a look at climate and environmental conditions affecting the country

programme.title: Borneo Dive Ep06
programme.desc: Explore the unique dive sites of Sabah and Sarawak, which attract both local and international divers. The region offers a rich variety of marine life for recreational and avid divers to observe.

programme.title: (DL) Detik Dunia
programme.desc: Detik Dunia membawakan rangkuman berita antarabangsa, mengetengahkan perkembangan global serta kisah-kisah yang membentuk landskap dunia hari ini.

programme.title: Sanggar Vista Ep09
programme.desc: Menjejak rumah-rumah cantik di Sarawak. Keindahan adalah subjektif, maka program ini menampil pelbagai jenis rumah, bukan hanya banglo mewah, tetapi juga rumah tradisional dan sederhana yang dihias indah.

programme.title: Studio 3 Ep04
programme.desc: STUDIO 3 menampilkan persembahan khas Dato Awie diiringi muzik sentuhan elemen borneo dan turut menggandingkan penyanyi tempatan Sarawak, Carrie Geres, Hairee Francis dan Faris Malek.

programme.title: Kumang

programme.title: Kumang & the Ungrateful Phyton
programme.desc: Kumang raises a baby python, but as it grows,it demands her heart.She tricks it and seeks help from a Mynah bird, offering golden earrings. Hiding in a thorny tree, she wounds the python,teaching a lesson.

programme.title: Tony Lapar Lagi! Ep04
programme.desc: Tony bukan chef,tapi meneroka warisan kulinari melalui penceritaan.Satu hidangan membuka kisah;menilai sama ada resipi dihidupkan,diperbaharui atau dipelihara.Siri ini meraikan evolusi makanan Malaysia.

programme.desc: Inspired by a Sarawak folklore tale, The Widow and the Colourful Clothed Frog follows a widow and her granddaughter who encounter a mysterious colourful frog believed to bring fortune.

Each time Atok Halim tells his story, audience will be brought on a memory walk back to when he was just a young teenage boy on an adventure with two of his buddies, Jo and Din in the 1970s.

programme.title: Makan Viral - EP 2

programme.title: Kannae Kaniamuthe S3 - EP 35
programme.desc: Lives have changed—some for better, others for worse. As old wounds heal, new faces arrive, bringing unexpected challenges and shifting loyalties. Will they lead our protagonists toward growth or darker paths? As choices and consequences collide, this season explores identity, forgiveness, and change through gripping drama and unpredictable twists.

programme.title: Kaimatru Man vs Life - EP 9
programme.desc: At 80, Guru chops wood to care for his family, unrelenting despite age. Nitra learns some men never retire — they endure life, fully, and with responsibility.

programme.title: Must Date the Playboy! - EP 20
programme.desc: In the captivating drama "Must Date the Playboy," we follow the journey of Victoria, a loyal friend determined to shield her best friend, Chloe, from further heartbreak. When Victoria discovers that Zach, the notorious playboy of their high school, is behind Chloe's string of failed relationships, she devises a bold plan: propose to Zach herself to keep him occupied and away from Chloe's heart.

programme.title: You Mean The World To Me
programme.desc: unny, pembuat filem pulang ke kampungnya untuk membuat filem mengenai keluarganya. Berdepan masalah kewangan, dia bersemuka dengan kebenaran tentang keluarganya dan belajar menerima peristiwa lampau.

programme.desc: Saksikan pengembaraan Wahid, Mazlan dan Azlee dalam mencapai cita-cita mereka menjadi bintang sehinggakan mereka disangka perompak yang menjadi buruan polis.

programme.title: The Making of The Furious

programme.title: Walid Ep02

programme.title: Satu Malam Perawan
programme.desc: Aisyah dan adiknya, Mira telah diculik dan dijual kepada Mummy Nora. Di situ, kehidupan Aisyah berubah dan menderita. Apakah kesudahan nasib Aisyah? Lakonan Diana Danielle, Erin Malek, Wan Nur Azlin dan Sheila Rusly.

programme.title: Karya 12 Vol 2: Pentas Haiwan
programme.desc: Kisah seorang guru yang menjadi guru sementara untuk mengajar kanak-kanak kelas lemah menghadapi cabaran daripada orang sekeliling dan juga pengetuanya.

programme.title: Mama Mama Mia
programme.desc: Kisah kehidupan 3 orang gadis serumah yang mula berubah setelah mereka menemui seorang bayi yang dibuang orang. Lakonan Lisa Surihani, Hanis Zalikha dan Mynn Lee.

programme.title: Chomel

programme.title: 5 Minit

programme.title: Walid Ep03
programme.desc: Walid semakin selesa di perlindungan baharu, namun tegang dengan Habiburrahman dalam perebutan kuasa. Di Jihad Ummah, Ummi berhati-hati mengukuh kedudukan—satu silap boleh menjatuhkan segalanya.

programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2
programme.desc: In this episode a 40-ton lorry rammed full of scrap metal overturns and spills its steel load across a major A road during rush hour, and Lantern recovery op Steve Knight is called to the scene. 25 tonnes of metal must be removed from the lorry before it can be lifted and with a damaged 5th wheel, it's a job that will push Steve and his team to the limit. At Crouch HQ there's excitement in the air

programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2
programme.desc: This week a heavy rescue like no other – as father and son Dave and Adam Crouch team up to save a lorry transporting a train from sinking into soft ground. Crouch Recovery Op Jim must rescue a lorry from a ditch after the driver attempted an ill-advised three-point turn. And while Rory moves an antique fire engine for the boss, Fluff must get rid of a lorry load of stinking cheese….

programme.title: Search4Hurt - Season 4
programme.desc: TV's most savage social experiment returns as Search4Hurt starts its mission to find the fittest everyday Aussies to join their hybrid sporting team, starting with HurtCamp.

programme.title: Search4Hurt - Season 4
programme.desc: After online qualifiers six male and female athletes take on the last test to claim their spot on Team S4H, that test is HurtCamp.

programme.title: Great Aussie Road Trips
programme.desc: Western Australia's Murchison GeoRegion is well known for its' ancient landscapes andbrilliant skies, this is the real outback. We take a journey through a region full of stories dating back tothe earth's beginning, around 4½ billion years ago.

programme.title: Great Aussie Road Trips
programme.desc: Part One of a journey along the Kamilaroi Highway, from Willow Tree to Moree, in NewSouth Wales, taking in The Great Divide on our way to the Great Australian Outback. Magnificentlandscapes, awesome attractions, and we meet some really cool people as we make our way througha region which traditional owners are spiritually connected to.

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled
programme.desc: Sara goes to Melbourne to explore the food culture and find the best local ingredients. First stop, the Queen Victoria Market.

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled
programme.desc: Sara heads to Victoria where she visits the farms and wineries, which she finds after travelling inland from the Great Ocean Road. She is planning to visit the restaurant Brae, which is run by an unknown chef.

programme.title: Don't Drive Here
programme.desc: Half of Mongolia lives in this city. And they drive their cars like they ride their horses: fast and furious.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-3
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife

programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2
programme.desc: A broken-down coach on a slip road of the motorway presents a major problem for Crouch recovery op Jon and Highways England. Recovery Op Marta and Tez work together to solve a serious weight issue on her trailer load. Lantern Recovery Op Scott attends a road collision to find a trailer too damaged to tow – with the sun going down, will he get off the highway before darkness falls?

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In China, Rooftop and Catfish continue their East Asian adventures. As if the leeches in Indonesia weren't enough, the bikers move on to bee sting therapy in China, strengthen their stomachs with some grasshoppers and mice wine, and attempt to transport hundreds of pounds of fish on nothing but a bike and sheer will power. The duo also undergo a hike of Chinese mountain Hua Shan, electro acupunctu

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: Off to Vietnam next, Rooftop and Catfish embark on what may be their most dangerous visit yet. The BMX bikers start their journey relatively tame with a shot of snake blood. However, things quickly escalate from there with the most intense game of frogger they've ever played in the Vietnamese streets. From a hospital visit and racing through the Vietcong tunnels to trying fertilized baby bird eggs

programme.title: Feral
programme.desc: If you asked experts what the most prevalent predator species in the United States is, without hesitation, the answer would be the Burmese pythons in the Florida Everglades. Growing up to 26-feet long and weighing as much as 200 pounds, the Burmese python has completely altered the ecosystem of the Everglades by eliminating over 99% of the native mammal population. To save the 'Glades, the hunter

programme.desc: A once sought-after pet, the green iguanas escaped their terrariums in the 60's and found the Florida eco-system to be a much more hospitable environment to call home. programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia to marry Alina, but his plans shatter when he is forced into an arranged marriage with Syifa. Bound by his father's debt of gratitude, Dafri faces endless conflicts and drama.

programme.title: Cinta Di Bawah Tangan Ep50
programme.desc: Love and sacrifice are put to the test when Hana must fight to save her family. However, her pure intentions lead her to an unexpected dilemma: a forced marriage to a stranger. Can Hana reunite her family and follow her heart?

programme.title: Cinta Setelah Cinta Ep50
programme.desc: Starla and Niko are a perfect couple with two children. Niko is secretly having an affair with their old friend, Ayu. When Ayu's husband, Ilham, catches them, a high-speed chase ends in a tragic accident.
